# Botfuss

Individual authors [fail to finish series][wiki-kingkiller], even with decades of time.
Instead of just waiting, we can take the matter into our hands!

This project is an attempt at collaborative writing, to create alternative fictions in the world of the Kingkiller Chronicle.
At least we will learn the craft, and may-be get a glimpse of the struggles that plague our esteemed authors.

## Open Source Writing

### Procedural

The world that would mostly live in the head of an individual author has to be materialized, so that there is a common reference that all the contributors can work on.

To lower the bar of creating new elements, it has been systematized with "schemas" much like the player sheet in a RPG.

### Iterative

Just like software, this work will be built and refined gradually.

From the title to a particular hot brew, the elements of the world and story can be written independently.

The main goal is to make writing easy, with:

- flexibility: allow different styles, different opinions, etc
- tolerance: allow mistakes, drafts, etc
- sharing: guides, examples, etc

With time / scale the collective work should improve.
So the focus is on the process, not the end result.

### Non Deterministic

Some elements are fixed and others have several possibilities.

Events at any time in the history can have multiple outcomes.

Running a specific instance of the world will generate a specific history among the possible universes.

This allows the different interpretations of the community to come together with minimum conflicts.

### "Issues" And "Bugs"

- typos, linguistic corrections
- inconsistencies, conflicts, etc
- missing elements

### "Features"

- updates to the world: characters, locations, lore, history, magic, etc
- storyline: POV, timeline, rewriting, etc

### "Branches"

- different histories
- alternative writing
- alternative rules: other magic system, other languages, etc
- translations

### RPG

turn based like HOMM
players act independently and if their choices are in conflic there is an interaction

### Magic APIs

TNOTW is exactly like coding, you have to know signature of the elements and call them appropriately.

### Space And Time

The elements of the world are indexed in space before time.

## Things We Can Definitely Do Better

Giving regular updates!

Being mindful of the community!

Letting the characters' egos speak, not the authors'.
